issues.impact: Any page the victim visits can fetch /api/me with their cookies and read the JSON body — full session-data exfil.

issues.evidence: Access-Control-Allow-Origin: null with credentials true on probe 2
issues.impact: An attacker page in a sandboxed iframe (or data: URL) gets credentialed read access without owning a domain at all.

issues.evidence: no Vary: Origin in either response
issues.impact: Caches between the user and origin can serve a stale ACAO meant for a different origin, broadening the attack window.

summary: Reflective ACAO with credentials true — credentialed cross-origin reads of /api/me from any attacker domain.
